title: Contact – Floella Benjamin
headings: h3: Have a browse of some other sections you might like...
text_excerpt: Contact – Floella Benjamin Home About Me Biography Credits Appointments Literary Information Charity News News Archive Political Activity Floella Benjamin Productions Touching Success Gallery My Podcast Contact Open Menu Contact If you would like to send Floella a message please email her at: mywebsite@floellabenjamin.com She does try to answer all emails but she is very busy at times, so please be patient! Unfortunately, due to high demand and a very busy schedule, Floella isn’t able to attend any school events at present. If you want Baroness Benjamin to speak at your conference or event get in touch with Keith Taylor at Benjamin Taylor Associates: flokeith@tiscali.co.uk Please note, for all appearances other than for her chosen charities there will be an appropriate appearance fee.
